name: honeypots
description: 25 different honeypots in a single pypi package! (dns, ftp, httpproxy, http, https, imap, mysql, pop3, postgres, redis, smb, smtp, socks5, ssh, telnet, vnc, mssql, elastic, ldap, ntp, memcache, snmp, oracle, sip and irc). Tool: https://github.com/qeeqbox/honeypots. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #403 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map honeypots output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved honeypots output file to parse instead of running it live.
